summary: Iteration 147 - Capacitor mobile app integration testing complete. All native module imports work correctly on web without errors. The app gracefully degrades native features on web platform - DocumentScanner returns null, haptics/camera/share are no-ops, OfflineBanner only shows when offline. iOS and Android native projects exist with proper permissions configured.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Capacitor mobile integration verified. All native modules (camera, haptics, share, notifications, network, offline storage, app lifecycle) are properly guarded with isNativePlatform() checks. DocumentScanner component returns null on web. OfflineBanner only shows when navigator.onLine is false. iOS/Android native projects exist at /app/frontend/ios and /app/frontend/android with proper permissions.

native_module_integration: App loads at root URL without import errors - PASS
No critical JS errors from native module imports - PASS
Login flow works correctly after native init - PASS
Dashboard loads with enlarged overview cards - PASS
Case detail page loads with heading - PASS
DocumentScanner component hidden on web (returns null) - PASS
Standard file input available for web uploads - PASS
OfflineBanner not rendered when online - PASS
No native module errors in console - PASS
capacitor_config_verification: iOS native project exists at /app/frontend/ios - PASS
Android native project exists at /app/frontend/android - PASS
iOS Info.plist has camera/photo/FaceID permissions - PASS
Android manifest has camera/storage/biometric permissions - PASS
Service worker updated with offline caching - PASS

platform_detection.status: PASS - All functions properly guard native calls

network.status: PASS - Falls back to navigator.onLine on web

notifications.status: PASS - Falls back to web Notification API

haptics.status: PASS - No-op on web (guarded by isNativePlatform())

share.status: PASS - Falls back to navigator.share or clipboard on web

app_lifecycle.status: PASS - Early return on web, handles status bar/splash/back button on native

OfflineBanner.behavior: Returns null when online, shows banner when offline

DocumentScanner.behavior: Returns null on web (isNativePlatform() check), shows camera buttons on native

DocumentsSection.behavior: Integrates DocumentScanner, standard file input always available
